hero.headlinePart1: You Are Not Traveling to Bahia.
hero.subheadline: An invitation to the Divine Diaspora Circle—the exclusive VIP immersion in Salvador, Brazil.
hero.ctaButton: Claim Your Seat in the Circle

theAnchor.body1: The Base Journey at $2,995 includes your sacred passage: airfare, accommodations, daily Kemetic Yoga practice, cultural immersion, and the transformative presence of Master Yirser Ra Hotep and Queen Afua.
theAnchor.body2: It is complete. It is intentional. It is the anchor.
theAnchor.body3: But for those called to go deeper—
theAnchor.body4: For those who recognize this not as a trip, but as continuity—the VIP experience extends your passage beyond the physical journey into a year-long practice of integration, community, and ongoing alignment.

vipExclusives.subheadline: Five pillars that extend your passage into lasting practice.

exclusives.title: 1-Year Kemetic Yoga Online Community
exclusives.description: 2x weekly live classes for ongoing alignment. Practice doesn't end when you return—it deepens.

exclusives.title: The Monthly Sankofa Travel Journal
exclusives.description: A living integration space for cultural grounding. Your journey documented, your insights cultivated.

exclusives.title: Private VIP Dinner
exclusives.description: Intimate evening with Queen Afua and Master Yirser Ra Hotep. Not a photo op—a true exchange.

exclusives.title: Branded Ancestral Garment
exclusives.description: A physical marker of your passage and return. Wear it as recognition of what you now carry.

exclusives.title: Future Travel Credit
exclusives.description: Up to $500 toward future journeys. Because once you return, you'll want to continue going.

master1.name: Master Yirser Ra Hotep
master1.title: Founder, YogaSkills Method
master1.bio: For over four decades, Master Yirser has been a pillar in the practice and teaching of Kemetic Yoga. His method weaves ancient Egyptian wisdom with breath, geometry, and deep alignment. He does not perform—he transmits. And under his guidance, the body becomes a vessel for ancestral memory.

master2.name: Queen Afua
master2.title: Holistic Health Visionary & Author
master2.bio: A global wellness elder and author of Sacred Woman, Queen Afua has devoted her life to the spiritual and physical healing of Black women and communities worldwide. Her presence is medicine. Her teaching is ceremony. And in her company, healing becomes not just personal—but collective.

investment.heading: The Complete VIP Experience
investment.subheadline: All the elements of the Base Journey plus one year of ongoing practice, integration, and intimate access.
investment.finePrint: Limited to 12 VIP participants. First-come basis.

finalInvitation.body1: If something in you stirred while reading this...
finalInvitation.footerText: THE DIVINE DIASPORA CIRCLE · SALVADOR, BRAZIL 2026
